name: bench
description: Run the project's benchmarks and summarise the result, with optional iteration count + warmup overrides.
prompt_template:
Run the project's benchmark suite${suffix_hint}.

Use iteration count = ${iterations}; warmup = ${warmup}. If ATELIER.md declares a different benchmark command, use that instead.

Report:

- Per-bench wall-clock (mean + p95).
- Throughput where the harness reports it.
- Any regression vs. the previous run if a baseline file exists at `tests/baselines/`.

Flag any bench that took >2x the baseline as a regression.

args.name: suffix_hint
args.description: Optional free-text suffix appended to the first sentence (e.g., ' on the parser module only').
